name: The Lost Treasures
original_name: สมบัติมหาเฮง
overview: When a boy whose destiny is torn Instead, he was destined for the night with holy mystical powers until he grew up to be a young man who saves the world. Along with a special talent, the Divine Eye saw the souls of the dead float around in order to undo the karma for those souls. But it made him not sure. Is he lucky to survive in childhood, or his nemesis, who has to mess with the ghosts?!!
